text: for Portland I realized that one of my big heart openers was my grandfather he's still alive but I was very close with him like growing up and so I found too that you know thinking about him and his teachings to me throughout my life was a really a big heart opener I hadn't known my great-grandfather and he passed when I was very young and then my grandfather's younger brother I knew him very well growing up he taught me many things and I have a lot of fond memories of him and when I was in middle school he actually passed away in a tragic airplane crash and so I didn't really know how to process that because he was one of the closest people to me to pass at that age and so I would write letters to him in my room and so during the coherence healing the first coherence healing in Portland after we finished the walking portion of the meditation and I and I put my hands on my heart I immediately saw my uncle clear as day in front of me with his big goofy smile and he took me to to a memory and I was standing with him in my bedroom and I could just see everything in the room exactly as it was it was as if you know I was in that exact moment but we were looking over myself writing the letters so I knew that he was telling me that he was there you know cuz he didn't talk to me in this in this experience he just was sharing feelings with me and emotions and so after that he then took me to in a second memory which was in the same timeframe as when I wrote the letters one morning I woke up from school or to go to school and and I had I grew up Catholic so I had a cross on my wall and I woke up in the morning and on my bedside table was the cross sitting on the table and I remember waking up that and I was just so confused why was this here and so he and I had totally forgotten about it because I was just like oh better go to school and you know and then I totally forgot about that experience and so when he brought me there I knew that he was sending me a sign or a message that he was there so then I become aware that I'm back in the coherent sealing room and my body is just sobbing uncontrollably like as if I was a child and I began to rock and it felt as if he was holding me and just like rocking me to the call me and then I began to breathe like in synchronicity with him it felt like and as soon as I kind of was able to gather that calmness I felt him take my hand and I and I looked up and he had reached his hand out and up walks my great-grandfather and his older brother who had passed when the year I was born and they all synched hands and in that moment I I had a new awareness and a new awakening he sent me this message that I am NOT my body and to share that with others and I also understood that they lived in me and and they lived all around me in that that we were at one and that and that was just the start of it I mean it's it goes beyond that but it was just such an eye-opening experience to understand the depth of that as soon as I finished the coherence healing I immediately just wanted to go home and like send love to every one of my family and my friends and anybody in my life and just to share this experience

description.simpleText:
Kelley had a delightful, mystical family reunion during a Coherence Healing session.

Recorded at the Cancun Advanced Week Long Retreat in December 2019 .

Disclaimer: The opinions expressed in this video are personal experiences of Encephalon event participants. Encephalon’s YouTube channel provides a platform for participant expression. Meditation may be used as a supplement to current medical treatments. The opinions expressed in this video are not meant to be used for self-diagnosis or to replace the services of a medical professional. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition including diagnosis or choice of treatment. Encephalon, Dr Joe, and individuals appearing in this video are not liable for any damages or injury resulting from your reliance on any information provided. The views and opinions expressed in this video are those of the speakers and do not necessarily reflect the views or positions of Encephalon or Dr Joe.
